error_signature: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
title: Handling error output from Markdown node
symptom: When the Markdown node fails, it throws an error 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object', causing the workflow to break. The workflow does not continue to the next nodes as expected.
applies_when: Handling errors in a workflow with multiple branches
not_this_if: The Markdown node executes successfully without errors
root_cause: The error occurs when the Markdown node receives undefined or null input, which prevents it from processing correctly. This disrupts the workflow as the subsequent nodes cannot receive valid data from the failed node.
fix_steps: Add a filter after the Markdown node
Configure the filter to check if the output is not equal to the error message 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object'
Connect the Firecrawl node's output to the next node to ensure it proceeds when the Markdown node fails
agent_instruction: Implement a filter after the Markdown node to block its output on error and allow Firecrawl's output to continue.
